Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Investigate existing functionality when triaging feature requests (#1284)

The issue triager now searches the codebase before commenting on feature
requests, checking whether the requested functionality already exists.

Motivated by #1264 — the user asked for dynamic layout switching in the
picker, which is already implemented via `PreviewLayout::auto_detect()`.
The triager would have just said "I'll leave it for a maintainer"
without
investigating.

Changes:
- Add step 4 (investigate existing functionality) for feature requests —
  grep for relevant terms in source, CLI, docs, and config
- Split feature request comment template into "may already exist" (with
  open-minded framing) and "does not exist" variants
- Restructure step numbering for linear flow — each step states which
  issue types it applies to instead of routing instructions in step 2

Ref #1264

> _This was written by Claude Code on behalf of @max-sixty_

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(pos): fetch KDS tickets via server API instead of browser client

The KDS board was empty when the browser Supabase client lacked an
auth session (no JWT). Now getActiveTickets() and getCompletedToday()
go through GET /api/kitchen/tickets which uses createServerRepository
(service_role key, bypasses RLS). Mutations already used server API.

commit.message:
test(domain): add comprehensive test coverage for commerce services (#70) (#98)

Add 194 new tests across all 5 layers for fulfillment, inventory, and
tax services — from near-zero coverage to full pyramid compliance.

- L1 Unit: service helper logic, event models, static methods
- L2 Component: service business logic with mocked repo/event bus
- L3 Integration: stateful repo mocks, lifecycle flows, event capture
- L4 API: HTTP endpoint contracts via TestClient (status codes, errors)
- L5 Smoke: cross-service order flows (reserve → tax → ship → commit)

Fixes #70

default, causing 'This Connection is closed' on connect.

commit.message:
Initial release: Dex2C Gradle Plugin

Gradle plugin that integrates dex2c into the Android build pipeline,
automatically converting selected DEX methods to native C++ during
assembleRelease and bundleRelease builds.

- Plugin DSL with filters, NDK, and Python configuration
- APK transform via AGP ArtifactTransformationRequest API
- AAB transform via SingleArtifact.BUNDLE
- DEX patching with dexlib2 (marks methods native)
- CMake + NDK compilation for multiple ABIs
- Bundled Python dex2c core and androguard
- JNI runtime files (Dex2C.h, DynamicRegister, well_known_classes)
- Sample Android app demonstrating usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: initial implementation of clorc multi-agent orchestrator

Core architecture with plan-execute-review-fix loop:
- ClaudeRunner with temp file piping, session resume, and concurrent process support
- PromptBuilder with context injection to eliminate cold-start overhead
- Smart task grouping (configurable batch size) with session resume between groups
- Parallel backend/frontend agent dispatch via Promise.all
- Lightweight review mode for small milestones
- Real-time web dashboard with WebSocket streaming
- EventBus-driven architecture for decoupled communication
- CLI entry point with commander.js

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: clorc
repository.description: Autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code CLI. Breaks down complex projects into milestones, dispatches parallel backend/frontend agents, runs automated code reviews, and provides a real-time web dashboard — all from a single command.

commit.message:
feat: implement password reset flow end-to-end

- Fix redirectTo URL to /reset-password (matches Expo Router auth group path)
- Create reset-password screen: waits for PASSWORD_RECOVERY session event,
  shows new password form, calls supabase.auth.updateUser on submit
- Add reset-password, forgot-password, phone-login to PUBLIC_ROUTES so
  unauthenticated users can access them
- Register all missing auth screens in (auth)/_layout.tsx

Also: fix Supabase Site URL in dashboard — change to production URL, not localhost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: batch DB init (58 round-trips → 3) + fix N+1 queries + add caching

What changed:
- Schema initialization: batched 30 CREATE TABLE statements into 1 Turso
  batch call, 38 CREATE INDEX into another. Cold start drops from ~58
  sequential network round-trips to just 3 batch calls.
- Home page query: replaced N+1 correlated subqueries (2 per debate) with
  efficient LEFT JOIN aggregation. One query instead of 13.
- Debates API: same LEFT JOIN optimization for argument/vote counts.
- Added Cache-Control headers (s-maxage=15, stale-while-revalidate=30) to
  debates and activity API routes.
- Home page uses revalidate=30 instead of force-dynamic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
